items.docs: Checks that the supplied uptrain-access-token is valid.

info.name: Run evaluations on a set of LLM responses.

items.docs: Evaluates each row of input data against the supplied list of checks and returns per-check scores and explanations.

info.name: Log data to a project and evaluate it.

items.docs: Logs the data under a named project and evaluates it, persisting results to the UpTrain dashboard. Also backs evaluate_experiments.

info.name: Download evaluation results for a project.

items.docs: Returns all evaluation results logged under the named project.

info.name: Perform root cause analysis on failing responses.

items.docs: Analyzes failing RAG / LLM responses and classifies why each response was poor.
Pairs a dataset with a checkset and runs the checks asynchronously.

info.name: Get the status of a run.

items.docs: Returns the run object with its current status.

info.name: Download the results of a completed run.

items.docs: Returns the evaluation results for a completed run.
Uploads a JSONL / CSV dataset of evaluation rows and registers it under a name.
Registers a named bundle of checks to pair with a dataset in a run. Also backs add_experiment.
